In February of Meiji 7 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Precinct === File:Niwata Jinja Honden.jpg|Honden File:Niwata Jinja Zuishinmon.jpg|Zuishin gate File:Niwata Jinja Massha.jpg|Subsidiary shrine File:Niwata Jinja Kaguraden.jpg|Kagura hall File:Niwata Jinja Kameishi.jpg|Kame-ishi (turtle stone) === Local information === === Location === *{{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shisō|Q877216|WD=Q877216|1=Shisō, Hyōgo}}Ichinomiya-chō Nōkura 1286 === Nearby === *{{ill|lt=Iwa Shrine|Q65320|WD=Q65320|1=Iwa Shrine (Matsumoto)}} ... 3 km to the southwest === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province|Q11498723|WD=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} === External links === *[http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6320091.html Niwata Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:宍粟市の建築物]] [[Category:宍粟市の歴史]]

According to the '{{ill|lt=Harima no Kuni Fudoki|Q11498726|WD=Q11498726|1=Harima no Kuni Fudoki}}', after Iwa Ōkami ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) completed final negotiations in the land of Iwa, he gathered the deities who had joined in achieving the great work of nation-building, brewed sake, selected a pure court of mountains and rivers, and held a banquet of consolation. This shrine is said to be that pure court where the banquet was held. It also records that when dried rice carried as emergency food was rehydrated, part of it molded and produced alcohol components, leading to the discovery of sake. === Historical outline === In the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}' {{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=register of deities|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, completed in year 5 of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}), "Niwata Shrine" is listed in {{ill|lt=Shisō District|Q7499122|WD=Q7499122|1=Shisō District, Hyōgo}} of {{ill|lt=Harima Province|Q1047523|WD=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}}, and ranked as a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN|lt=small Shikinaisha}}. The shrine buildings were repaired in year 11 of {{ill|lt=Kanbun|Q1146228|WD=Q1146228|1=Kanbun (era)}} ({{ill|lt=1671|Q7610|WD=Q7610|1=1671}}), but burned down in November of year 3 of {{ill|lt=Bunkyū|Q730266|WD=Q730266|1=Bunkyū}} ({{ill|lt=1863|Q7701|WD=Q7701|1=1863}}), and were rebuilt in year 4 of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1871|Q7746|WD=Q7746|1=1871}}). In February of Meiji 7 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Precinct === File:Niwata Jinja Honden.jpg|Honden File:Niwata Jinja Zuishinmon.jpg|Zuishin gate File:Niwata Jinja Massha.jpg|Subsidiary shrine File:Niwata Jinja Kaguraden.jpg|Kagura hall File:Niwata Jinja Kameishi.jpg|Kame-ishi (turtle stone) === Local information === === Location === *{{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shisō|Q877216|WD=Q877216|1=Shisō, Hyōgo}}Ichinomiya-chō Nōkura 1286 === Nearby === *{{ill|lt=Iwa Shrine|Q65320|WD=Q65320|1=Iwa Shrine (Matsumoto)}} ... 3 km to the southwest === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province|Q11498723|WD=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} === External links === *[http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6320091.html Niwata Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Niwata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:宍粟市の建築物]] [[Category:宍粟市の歴史]]
